prestazioni: Upgrade to a custom dual-motor setup utilizing the factory 'LE9' tri-motor architecture with a bespoke inverter calibration by Cascadia Motion, targeting 1,400+ hp while maintaining OEM torque vectoring precision via Lucid's proprietary 'Wunderbox' power distribution unit (PDU) firmware revision 2.3.4

Installation of a Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger system (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing) paired with a PTP titanium turbo manifold, custom 4-inch downpipe, and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate for each rear motor, with a secondary BorgWarner EFR 9180 turbo for the front motor, all managed via a Motec M150 ECU with Lucid-specific CAN bus integration

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential with carbon fiber clutch packs for the rear axle, a custom billet aluminum driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,800 Nm), and a set of 300M steel axles with CV joints reinforced by Neapco for sustained 0-60 mph launches under 1.8 seconds
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk LB-SAPPHIRE kit, featuring aggressive front canards, extended rear fenders with integrated air vents, and a custom rear diffuser with active aerodynamics controlled via Lucid's existing air suspension ECU

Custom forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF16 21x11.5 front, 22x12.5 rear) with titanium lug bolts, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 R21 front, 335/25 R22 rear) and paired with a custom AP Racing BBK (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 380mm rear)

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery), a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, powder-coated Sapphire Blue), and a bespoke digital dash by AIM MXS Strada with Lucid Air-specific telemetry integration for real-time torque vectoring and battery management data
